ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Link selected note in Workbench
ast.target: 在 Workbench 中链接所选笔记

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Copy line
ast.target: 复制行

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Link block
ast.target: 链接块

ast.name: log
ast.source: Unloading the Workbench plugin.
ast.target: 正在卸载 Workbench 插件。

ast.name: log
ast.source: This line is not currently a block. Adding a block ID.
ast.target: 此行目前不是块。正在添加块 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Provide a title for the workbench note. Default is Workbench.
ast.target: 为 Workbench 笔记提供标题。默认是 Workbench。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the prefix to each line added to Workbench. Default is nothing.
ast.target: 设置添加到 Workbench 的每一行的前缀。默认无前缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle whether there should be a blank line between each Workbench entry.
ast.target: 切换每个 Workbench 条目之间是否需要空行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set what happens when you alt+click on a link. Default is to copy the link into the Workbench. Note: if your cursor is not already on the targeted line, you may need to double-click!
ast.target: 设置在链接上 alt+点击时的行为。默认是将链接复制到 Workbench。注意：如果光标不在目标行上，可能需要双击！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set what happens when you cmd/ctrl+alt+click on a line. Default is to link the line as a block into the Workbench. Note: if your cursor is not already on the targeted line, you may need to double-click!
ast.target: 设置在行上 cmd/ctrl+alt+点击时的行为。默认是将该行作为块链接到 Workbench。注意：如果光标不在目标行上，可能需要双击！

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Workbench note name
ast.target: 工作台笔记名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Workbench line prefix
ast.target: 工作台行前缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Blank lines
ast.target: 空行

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Alt+Click type
ast.target: Alt+点击类型

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Meta+Alt+Click type
ast.target: Meta+Alt+点击类型

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Sorry, this doesn't work when you click directly on a link. Try clicking outside of the link!
ast.target: 抱歉，直接点击链接时此功能无效。请尝试点击链接外部！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There is nothing on the selected line.
ast.target: 所选行上没有内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No headings found in the current document.
ast.target: 当前文档中未找到标题。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: All headings are below the cursor. Link the note or a block instead.
ast.target: 所有标题都在光标下方。请改为链接笔记或块。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Link the current note/page in your Workbench.
ast.target: 在工作台中链接当前笔记/页面。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Link the current line/block in your Workbench.
ast.target: 将当前行/块链接到你的 Workbench。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Copy the current line/block into your Workbench.
ast.target: 将当前行/块复制到你的 Workbench。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Copy the current line/block into your Workbench as a markdown link to the line/block.
ast.target: 将当前行/块作为指向该行/块的 Markdown 链接复制到你的 Workbench。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Link the current heading/section into your Workbench.
ast.target: 将当前标题/章节链接到你的 Workbench。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Clear the workbench note.
ast.target: 清空 Workbench 笔记。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Insert the contents of the workbench note.
ast.target: 插入 Workbench 笔记内容。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Change your Workbench.
ast.target: 更改你的 Workbench。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Workbench Settings
ast.target: Workbench 设置
